pi_items.source: Manually verified by reading the task description prompt, which explicitly instructs the user to configure these exact values.
The verifier.py script is completely missing from the task directory, making it impossible to verify the intended usage of this tolerance value.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring two currencies in SuiteCRM: Euro (EUR) with rate 0.915 and British Pound (GBP) with rate 0.782, both set to Active. These exact parameters are synthetically provided in the explicit task instructions. A major issue is that the specified verifier.py is missing from the task directory.
